channel.title: evaluation on Scepter914 Website
channel.description: Recent content in evaluation on Scepter914 Website

item.title: MTBF Model for AVs - From Perception Errors to Vehicle-Level Failures (IV2022)
item.description: MTBF Model for AVs - From Perception Errors to Vehicle-Level Failures (IV2022) Summary from Intel + Mobileye RSS modelはPerception errorを考慮していなかったため、perception system error と vehicle-level failures (= collision) を
